entries.insight: WithMTLS ClientOption must explicitly set InsecureSkipVerify: false to prevent MITM. httptest.NewTLSServer requires injecting ts.Client().Transport's TLS configuration into the SDK client for valid unit test handshakes.
traps: Avoid hardcoded dev shortcuts in exported SDK functions.
Modifying tls.Config on an http.Client after the Transport has performed a dial may have no effect.

entries.insight: Standard URL pre-validation is vulnerable to DNS Rebinding (TOCTOU). SSRF protection must be enforced at the Dial layer by pinning the connection to a validated IP.
traps: Global state for mockable dependencies (like net.Resolver) causes data races in tests.
httptest.NewServer defaults to 127.0.0.1 which is typically blocked by SSRF guards; use dependency injection to allow test-only bypass.
